question: Define a `struct Book` with `title` (std::string) and `pages` (int). Create an array of 2 `Book` structs, populate their data, and print the title of the book with more pages.

test_cases.expected: Books have the same number of pages.

errors: Dereferencing an uninitialized pointer (uninitializedPtr) when book pages are equal, leading to undefined behavior (e.g., crash or garbage output) at runtime.
